calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Seal Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Warren Crandall, Esq. Chloe Sweeney Rowan, Esq. 212-715-1125 Hueston Hennigan for Plaintiff.
Morgan Whitworth, Esq. Samantha Kaplan, Esq. 415-395-8011 for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice to contest the TR was received from the party who did not file an Opposition.

ARGUED. The Court admonishes parties; the court received nothing except Plaintiff's motion, there was plenty of opportunity to weigh in, strategy to live without a ruling, no disclosure re removal to another court or to continue the hearing. The court poses questions. Mr. Crandall submitt to the TR. Mr. Whitworth apologizes to the court, did not oppose, oversight, technical issues on filing.The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFFs SILICON VALLEY CLEAN ENERGY,and CENTRAL COAST COMMUNITY ENERGY's Motion To Seal Portions Of Complaint.

Plaintiffs Silicon Valey Clean Energy and Central Coast Community Energy's unopposed Motion To Seal Portions Of Complaint is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
